milestoneTitle: Phase 8.12.33 — reverted the icon-uniformity work (M8.12.23→32). Back to original viewBox="0 0 24 24" on all three dash-panel icons, no preserveAspectRatio override, no vector-effect, stroke-width back to 0.5. 54px render size from M8.12.28 retained. Icons will again look mildly inconsistent in size but render at their natural proportions — cleaner than the stretch+compensation approach
